title: MCP-A discover Request
description: Request for the discover primitive (SPEC §1): return a dynamic, RBAC-filtered catalog of information domains plus server capability metadata.

user_id.description: Authenticated user ID. RBAC is evaluated against this user.

semantic_filter.description: Optional natural-language / keyword filter over domain names and descriptions (e.g., 'contracts').

limit.description: Maximum number of domains to return (default 100).
